SingleReadSNV.FeatureMapPrep.CreateFeatu.description: Optional array of SingleReadSNVModel structs for model-aware featuremap creation

SingleReadSNV.FeatureMapPrep.FilterInclu.description: Base file name for output files.
Number of cpus to use for this task. Default is 4.
Size of the local disk to use for this task, in GB. By default it is calculated from the input file sizes.
Regions to exclude from the output vcf. Supported formats are bed, bed.gz, vcf, vcf.gz. VCF exclusion is done using bcftools view -T ^regions, by position and not by ref and alt.
Regions to include in the output vcf. Supported formats are bed, bed.gz. Inclusion is done using 'bcftools view -T'.
Amount of memory to use for this task, in GB. Default is 4 (GB).

SingleReadSNV.annotation_files.description: Annotation files for featuremap generation: dbSNP, gnomAD, and UG High Confidence Regions with their indices

SingleReadSNV.base_file_name.description: Base file name for output files. The output files will be named [base_file_name].with_ml_qual.vcf.gz

SingleReadSNV.create_md5_checksum_output.description: Create md5 checksum for requested output files

SingleReadSNV.exclude_from_training_fiel.description: INFO field name for the exclude-from-training annotation in the featuremap VCF. Default: EXCLUDE_TRAINING

SingleReadSNV.featuremap_params.description: FeatureMap parameters, recommended value set in the template.

SingleReadSNV.features.description: Features to be used for training the SNV quality model, should match pre trained model if one is given, recommended value set in the template.

SingleReadSNV.include_in_inference_field.description: INFO field name for the include-in-inference annotation in the featuremap VCF. Default: INCLUDE_INFERENCE

SingleReadSNV.include_vcf_bcftools_filte.description: Bcftools filter arguments applied to include-in-inference VCFs before annotation. Default: '-f PASS --type snps -m2 -M2' (PASS biallelic SNPs only). Override if your VCFs lack a PASS filter.

SingleReadSNV.mean_coverage.description: (Optional) Mean coverage value. Provide together with total_aligned_bases and without sorter_json_stats_file_list.

SingleReadSNV.min_coverage_to_train_mode.description: Minimum coverage to train the ML model, needed as label assignment (true/false SNV) is unreliable at low coverages, the recommended value is set in the template

SingleReadSNV.override_memory_gb_CreateF.description: Override memory in GB for the CreateFeatureMap task, default: 2 (GiB). If an out of memory error occurs in the CreateFeatureMap task, try increasing this value, e.g. double it.

SingleReadSNV.override_memory_gb_Prepare.description: Override memory in GB for the PrepareRandomSampleFeatureMap task, default: 16 (GiB). If an out of memory error occurs in the PrepareRandomSampleFeatureMap task, try increasing this value, e.g. double it.
Override memory in GB for the PrepareRawFeatureMap task, default: 128 (GiB). If an out of memory error occurs in the PrepareRawFeatureMap task, try increasing this value, e.g. double it.

SingleReadSNV.override_memory_gb_TrainMo.description: Override memory in GB for the TrainModel task, default: 32 (GiB). If an out of memory error occurs in the TrainModel task, try increasing this value, e.g. double it.

SingleReadSNV.pcawg_field_name.description: INFO field name for the PCAWG annotation in the featuremap VCF. Default: PCAWG

SingleReadSNV.pre_trained_model_files.description: Pre-trained ML model json files and .srsnv_metadata.json file. if provided the model will be used for inference and no self-trained model will be created. Use with care, the model must be trained on the same data type with the same features

SingleReadSNV.raise_exceptions_in_report.description: Raise and exception and fail the pipeline if an error is raised in the QC report

SingleReadSNV.random_sample_trinuc_freq.description: (Optional) CSV or TSV file with trinucleotide frequencies for the random sample. If provided, the random sample featuremap will be sampled according to the given trinucleotide frequency. If not provided, sampling is uniform.

SingleReadSNV.reference_genome.description: Genome type selector. The workflow currently supports only hg38.

SingleReadSNV.single_read_snv_params.description: SingleReadSNV parameters, recommended value set in the template.

SingleReadSNV.sorter_json_stats_file_lis.description: (Optional) Sorter json stats files. Provide EITHER these files OR both mean_coverage and total_aligned_bases.

SingleReadSNV.total_aligned_bases.description: (Optional) Total aligned bases used for downsampling rate calculation. Provide together with mean_coverage and without sorter_json_stats_file_list.

SingleReadSNV.train_on_gpu.description: Train the ML model on GPU, default: false

SingleReadSNV.xgboost_params_file.description: XGBoost parameters file for training the SNV quality model, recommended value set in the template.
